import { useMemo, useState } from 'react'; import ProductCard from '../components/ProductCard'; const mockProducts = [ { id: 1, name: 'Chuối Sấy Dẻo', price: 45000, oldPrice: 55000, image: 'https://picsum.photos/id/1015/600/600', category: 'trai-cay-say', tag: 'Bán chạy', }, { id: 2, name: 'Mít Sấy Giòn', price: 65000, oldPrice: 85000, image: 'https://picsum.photos/id/102/600/600', category: 'trai-cay-say', tag: 'Mới', }, { id: 3, name: 'Thanh Long Sấy', price: 52000, oldPrice: 62000, image: 'https://picsum.photos/id/201/600/600', category: 'trai-cay-say', tag: 'Healthy', }, { id: 4, name: 'Khoai Lang Sấy', price: 38000, oldPrice: 48000, image: 'https://picsum.photos/id/292/600/600', category: 'trai-cay-say', tag: 'Ưu đãi', }, { id: 5, name: 'Dừa Sấy Giòn', price: 72000, oldPrice: 89000, image: 'https://picsum.photos/id/133/600/600', category: 'trai-cay-say', tag: 'Hot', }, { id: 6, name: 'Xoài Sấy Dẻo', price: 59000, oldPrice: 75000, image: 'https://picsum.photos/id/431/600/600', category: 'trai-cay-say', tag: 'Tự nhiên', }, { id: 7, name: 'Hạt Macca Úc', price: 245000, oldPrice: 289000, image: 'https://picsum.photos/id/870/600/600', category: 'hat-dinh-duong', tag: 'Premium', }, { id: 8, name: 'Hạnh Nhân Rang', price: 185000, oldPrice: 219000, image: 'https://picsum.photos/id/669/600/600', category: 'hat-dinh-duong', tag: 'Organic', }, ]; const categories = [ { label: 'Tất cả', value: 'all', }, { label: 'Trái cây sấy', value: 'trai-cay-say', }, { label: 'Hạt dinh dưỡng', value: 'hat-dinh-duong', }, ]; const ProductsPage = () => { const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState(''); const [selectedCategory, setSelectedCategory] = useState('all'); const [sortOption, setSortOption] = useState('default'); // ========================= // FILTER & SORT // ========================= const filteredProducts = useMemo(() => { const result = mockProducts .filter((product) => { const matchSearch = product.name .toLowerCase() .includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()); const matchCategory = selectedCategory === 'all' || product.category === selectedCategory; return matchSearch && matchCategory; }) .sort((a, b) => { if (sortOption === 'price-low') { return a.price - b.price; } if (sortOption === 'price-high') { return b.price - a.price; } if (sortOption === 'name') { return a.name.localeCompare(b.name); } return 0; }); return result; }, [searchTerm, selectedCategory, sortOption]); return (
